privileged_info_summary: The demodb database contains three target hotels with verified initial values: Hotel Artemide has 4 stars (seed_demodb.py line 227), The Savoy has phone number +44-20-7836-4343 (line 230), and Hotel Adlon Kempinski has the name 'Hotel Adlon Kempinski' (line 228). These are the old values that must be saved to history records before updating them. The data is synthetic, generated by seed_demodb.py which seeds the database with real hotel names and locations. The task requires creation of HotelHistory vertex class and HasHistory edge class to implement versioned tracking.
